category_sources: source_facts.description says dnsgen generates DNS names from existing domain names; official README describes DNSGen as a DNS name permutation tool for security researchers and subdomain discovery.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the display name DNSGen.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe DNS name generation, domain permutations, and security assessment usage.
